name: YES BANK SELECT Credit Card
milestoneBenefits: First-year membership fee waived on spending Rs 10,000 within 30 days of card issuance
Renewal fee waiver on spending Rs 1,00,000 in a card anniversary year
additionalBenefits: Card was earlier known as YES Prosperity Edge
Priority Pass or LoungeKey membership for primary cardmember
1 complimentary domestic airport lounge visit per quarter
Purchase protection cover on eligible electronics
Green fee waiver and golf lessons at select golf courses

salaried: Eligibility is subject to YES BANK approval criteria
selfEmployed: Eligibility is subject to YES BANK approval criteria
